purpose: Separate true pipeline failures from source limitations that need official-source repair or archival research.

official_listing_evidence.title: Tribal Access to Certain Child Welfare and Criminal History Databases

items.reason: The official listing exists, but the linked Google Drive file currently returns a sign-in page instead of a usable PDF.
items.next_action: Request a valid official copy from the Governor's Office or Colorado State Archives, then archive it through manual source intake and rebuild the executive order layer.
items.manual_intake_command_shape: python -m geode.pipeline.manual_source_intake --root . --apply --record-id EO-2019-007 --layer-id 05_Executive_Orders --source-file <official_pdf_path> --official-source-name "Colorado Governor's Office or State Archives" --official-source-url https://www.colorado.gov/governor/2019-executive-orders --acquisition-method state_archives_request --received-from <source_contact> --reviewer-name <reviewer_name> --custody-note <custody_note> --json

items.reason: The document queue has no pending work, but many historical bill-text links point to legacy archive wrappers, blocked legacy hosts, or non-retryable missing files.
items.next_action: Use _CONTROL_PLANE/MODERN_LEGISCAN_REPAIR_QUEUE.json to repair the 41 modern-year items first, then build a legacy archive recovery strategy by host and year.

boundary: This register does not approve legal reliance on missing-source records. It documents why the download pipeline is closed while source-coverage repair remains open.
